result.stdout:
[03:49:51 INF] Stratos Developer Tools (sdt) utility 0.0.0.0 (©) Werner van Niekerk - 2026

Usage: sdt [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  clean-pkg     Removes unused PackageVersion entries in
                'Directory.Packages.props' file.
  props-to-cpm  Updates PackageVersion entries in 'Directory.Packages.props'
                with values found in the 'dependencies.props' file.
  publish       Publishes all configured assemblies to a given path. Assumes a
                runtime identifier (RID) has been set when provided.

Run 'sdt [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
[03:49:51 INF] Stratos Developer Tools (sdt) utility 0.0.0.0 (©) Werner van Niekerk - 2026

Removes unused PackageVersion entries in 'Directory.Packages.props' file.

Usage: sdt clean-pkg [options] <--path|-p=<START_PATH>>

Arguments:
  --path|-p=<START_PATH>  The path to a directory 'Directory.Packages.props'
                          files. If none is specified, the current directory
                          will be used.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information.
  -dr|--dry-run           Report modifications only - no file will be updated.

result.stdout:
[03:49:51 INF] Stratos Developer Tools (sdt) utility 0.0.0.0 (©) Werner van Niekerk - 2026

Publishes all configured assemblies to a given path. Assumes a runtime identifier (RID) has been set when provided.

Usage: sdt publish [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                             Show help information.
  -c|--configuration <CONFIG_FILE>         The configuration file used to
                                           determine project files to publish.
                                           If the no file is specified the
                                           default of 'publish.json' is used.
                                           Default value is: publish.json.
  -b|--build-configuration <BUILD_CONFIG>  The configuration file used to
                                           determine project files to publish.
                                           If the no file is specified the
                                           default of 'publish.json' is used.
                                           Default value is: Debug.
  -r|--runtime[:<RID>]                     Optional. The runtime identifier
                                           (RID) to use e.g. 'win-x64' or
                                           'linux-x64'. Requires the runtime to
                                           be specified in the .csproj file(s).
  -s|--sample-config                       Creates a sample config to be used as
                                           input. Uses a filename of
                                           'publish.json', and will fail if the
                                           file already exists at the current
                                           location.

commands.payload:
[03:49:51 INF] Stratos Developer Tools (sdt) utility 0.0.0.0 (©) Werner van Niekerk - 2026

Publishes all configured assemblies to a given path. Assumes a runtime identifier (RID) has been set when provided.

Usage: sdt publish [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                             Show help information.
  -c|--configuration <CONFIG_FILE>         The configuration file used to
                                           determine project files to publish.
                                           If the no file is specified the
                                           default of 'publish.json' is used.
                                           Default value is: publish.json.
  -b|--build-configuration <BUILD_CONFIG>  The configuration file used to
                                           determine project files to publish.
                                           If the no file is specified the
                                           default of 'publish.json' is used.
                                           Default value is: Debug.
  -r|--runtime[:<RID>]                     Optional. The runtime identifier
                                           (RID) to use e.g. 'win-x64' or
                                           'linux-x64'. Requires the runtime to
                                           be specified in the .csproj file(s).
  -s|--sample-config                       Creates a sample config to be used as
                                           input. Uses a filename of
                                           'publish.json', and will fail if the
                                           file already exists at the current
                                           location.
